name: co.gemina/filetag
title: Gemina FileTag
description: Tag, rename, and enrich PDFs and images. Free tier: 1,500 tags/month, no credit card. Streamable HTTP MCP server with X-API-Key auth. Get a key at https://console.gemina.co/registration/create-account

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Gemina API key. Get one free at https://console.gemina.co/registration/create-account
